question_prompt: Q14: When evaluating candidates, how much does each of the following influence your hiring decision?
panels: Q14: :: The candidate displays clear enthusiasm and a positive attitude throughout the process:
Q14: :: The candidate has a higher level of education than the role typically requires:
Q14: :: The candidate has a lower level of education but highly relevant hands-on experience:
Q14: :: The candidate has extensive experience but their skills feel outdated:
Q14: :: The candidate has strong qualifications but a poor attitude:
Q14: :: The candidate has strong relevant skills but less experience than the role requires:
answers: I'd be somewhat more likely to hire
I'd be much more likely to hire
I'd be somewhat less likely to hire
I'd be much less likely to hire
